sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: REXR SEC Filings - Rexford Indl Rlty Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (REXR) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K reports, and insider trading forms. Stock Titan offers AI-powered summaries to help investors understand complex disclosures and track corporate developments in real-time. The site also provides access to the company's regulatory disclosures as a publicly traded real estate investment trust specializing in infill Southern California industrial real estate.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 12.28M Rexford shares (5.29%) — Rexford Industrial Realty (NYSE: REXR)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 12,276,790 shares in Rexford Industrial Realty Inc (NYSE: REXR), representing 5.29% of the company's common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made through a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment. Vanguard's affiliated entities hold sole voting power for 1,929,986 shares and sole dispositive power for all 12,276,790 shares.

feed.title: RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd Q1 2026 10-Q Report: Financial Statements, Risk Factors, and Market Disclosures
feed.summary: RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd (NYSE: RNR) has released its Q1 2026 report, highlighting regulatory compliance and updated outstanding share figures. As of April 24, 2026, the company has 42,633,041 common shares outstanding and active trading of preference shares on the NYSE. Investors are advised to review the full SEC filing for detailed financial statements, management's discussion and analysis, and risk factors, which will provide deeper insights into the company's financial position and strategic direction.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: QLYS) holds 1.86M shares, 5.20% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 1,858,676 shares of Qualys Inc. common stock, which represents a 5.20% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. This information was disclosed in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating Vanguard holds sole voting power over 274,070 shares and sole dispositive power over all 1,858,676 shares. The filing was signed on April 30, 2026, by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration.

feed.title: RadNet and Trinity Health’s Saint Alphonsus Health System Launch a Multi-Site Joint Venture in Boise, Idaho, to Include a Broad Technology Deployment of DeepHealth Solutions
feed.summary: RadNet, Inc. has formed a joint venture with Trinity Health’s Saint Alphonsus Health System by acquiring a majority stake in Intermountain Medical Imaging, which operates five outpatient imaging centers in Boise, Idaho. This collaboration will integrate RadNet's DeepHealth solutions, including AI-powered tools for clinical interpretation, reporting, and operational efficiencies, across the five locations. The partnership aims to enhance diagnostic imaging services, improve patient care, and streamline operations, projecting approximately $30 million in annual revenue for RadNet.

feed.title: Permit Capital and J. Broderick report holdings (QVCGA)
feed.summary: Permit Capital entities and John C. Broderick have filed a Schedule 13G/A, an amendment to a previous filing, disclosing their holdings in QVC Group, Inc.'s Series A Common Stock (CUSIP 74915M605). While Permit Capital, LLC, Permit Capital Enterprise Fund, LP, and Permit Capital GP, LP each report holding 0 shares, John C. Broderick is listed as holding 0 shares, representing 0.55% of the class. The filing was signed and dated on April 30, 2026, and provides details on beneficial ownership and the type of reporting persons.

feed.title: Weichai-controlled Power Solutions (NASDAQ: PSIX) details pay, ownership and plans
feed.summary: Power Solutions International (PSIX) has filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing its 2025 governance, executive compensation, ownership structure, and related-party transactions, notably with its controlling shareholder, Weichai. The report indicates that Weichai owns approximately 46% of PSIX's common stock, qualifying PSIX as a Nasdaq "controlled company," and reveals significant over-performance against its 2025 Key Performance Indicator (KPI) plan. The document also outlines executive pay, with CEO C. (Dino) Xykis receiving over $2.4 million in total compensation for 2025, and introduces a new 2026 Phantom Unit Plan.

feed.title: Pyxis Oncology, Inc. Files Amended 8-K/A Report for 2026 with SEC – Company Details, Address, and Nasdaq Listing
feed.summary: Pyxis Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYXS) filed an amended Form 8-K/A report with the SEC, announcing the departure of its CEO, Lara Sullivan, M.D., effective February 2, 2026. The filing also details a Separation and General Release Agreement between the company and Dr. Sullivan. Investors are advised to monitor future announcements regarding new leadership and potential strategic changes.

feed.title: Protalix BioTherapeutics (PLX) sets 2026 director, pay and stock plan votes
feed.summary: Protalix BioTherapeutics (PLX) has announced its 2026 annual stockholder meeting to be held on June 25, 2026, in Tel Aviv. Key agenda items include the election of eight directors, a non-binding advisory vote on executive compensation, and the approval of an amended 2006 Stock Incentive Plan to increase the share reserve by 3.5 million to 20,975,171 shares. The company also reported CEO Dror Bashan's 2025 compensation of $1.17 million and outlined change-in-control benefits for executives.

feed.title: PROCEPT BioRobotics (NASDAQ: PRCT) Q1 2026 revenue rises 20%
feed.summary: PROCEPT BioRobotics reported a 20% increase in Q1 2026 revenue to $83.1 million, driven by higher system sales, consumables, and services, especially in the United States. Despite an improved gross margin of 65%, the company's net loss widened to $31.6 million due to increased spending on research, sales, and administration to support growth initiatives. As of March 31, 2026, the company had $245.6 million in cash and cash equivalents and an installed base of 971 robotic systems globally.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management reports 19.3M PTEN shares (NYSE: PTEN)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 19,259,019 shares of Patterson-UTI Energy Inc. (NYSE: PTEN), representing a 5.07% stake in the company. The Schedule 13G filing, dated April 30, 2026, indicates that Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2,638,211 shares. This disclosure highlights Vanguard's significant, passive investment in the oil and gas drilling company.

feed.title: Winter Storms Set Off Avalanche of Bottom-Line Impacts at Pilgrim’s
feed.summary: Pilgrim's Pride Corp. experienced a significant decline in first-quarter net income due to "multi-faceted" impacts from winter storms, including plant shutdowns and disruptions to live operations. President Fabio Sandri explained that the storms led to processing delays, changes in bird sizes, and increased overtime costs. These weather-related issues, combined with lower jumbo cut out values and bird health problems, contributed to a 65.3% drop in net income and a 42.2% fall in adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Vanguard shows 5.09% stake in Protagonist Therapeutics (NASDAQ: PTGX)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.09% beneficial ownership in Protagonist Therapeutics (NASDAQ: PTGX), holding 3,250,003 shares of common stock. According to a Schedule 13G SEC filing, Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 444,107 shares. The filing was signed on April 30, 2026, indicating an investment purpose rather than an attempt to influence control.

feed.title: PXED (Phoenix Education Partners) CAO receives 5,196 RSUs equity grant
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. (PXED) Chief Accounting Officer Jeffrey Charles Honaker was granted 5,196 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an equity award. These RSUs, valued at $0.00 per share, are part of a compensation grant tied to the company's 2025 Omnibus Incentive Plan. The RSUs will vest over a multi-year period, with one-third vesting on October 8, 2026, and the remainder vesting quarterly over two years.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13D/A] PROKIDNEY CORP. Amended Major Shareholder Report
feed.summary: Control Empresarial and the Slim family have amended their Schedule 13D/A filing for ProKidney Corp., disclosing a beneficial ownership of 73,842,723 shares of Class A common stock, representing 36.0% of the outstanding shares. This increase in holdings is primarily due to an exchange on April 28, 2026, where Control Empresarial converted 63,118,645 Paired Interests and Class B common stock into Class A common stock. The updated ownership percentage is calculated based on a total of 205,061,550 Class A shares outstanding.

feed.title: Polestar (PSNY) Chief Accounting Officer granted 2,161 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC's Chief Accounting Officer, Lisa Marie Thomson Klang, was granted 2,161 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of a long-term incentive program. Each RSU represents a contingent right to receive one Class A American Depositary Share, with the RSUs scheduled to vest in the second quarter of 2029. This transaction is classified as an award, not a stock purchase or sale, and it signifies compensation rather than open-market trading activity.

feed.title: [144] PRICESMART INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on a Pricesmart Inc. (PSMT) SEC Form 144 filing, which indicates a proposed sale of 635 shares of Common Stock acquired through a restricted stock transaction on January 30, 2026. The aggregate market value of these shares is $100,076.00, and they are set to be sold on NASDAQ via Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. The filing also provides details on the issuer, filer, and confirms no other sales by the person for whose account the securities are being sold within the past three months.

feed.title: PriceSmart (NASDAQ: PSMT) insider reports 8,000-share bona fide stock gift
feed.summary: PriceSmart director and 10% owner Robert E. Price reported a bona fide gift of 8,000 shares of common stock. The gifted shares were held indirectly through the Robert and Allison Price Trust UDT 1/10/75, which now holds 1,126,667 shares of PriceSmart common stock. The filing also details other indirect holdings and states that both Robert and Allison Price disclaim beneficial ownership in certain trusts except to the extent of their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: PriceSmart (NASDAQ: PSMT) major holder makes bona fide gift of shares
feed.summary: Price Philanthropies Foundation, a ten percent owner of PriceSmart Inc. (NASDAQ: PSMT), has reported a charitable transfer of 8,000 shares of the company's common stock. The transaction was a bona fide gift at $0.00 per share, leaving the foundation with 2,854,525 direct shares. This gift represents a small portion of the foundation's overall holdings in PriceSmart.

feed.title: Post‑Effective Amendment No.11 — Prospect Capital (NASDAQ: PSEC)
feed.summary: Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) has filed Post-Effective Amendment No. 11 to its Form N-2 registration statement. This amendment's primary purpose is to furnish exhibits and incorporate financial statements, including consolidated statements as of June 30, 2022, and interim statements as of December 31, 2022, along with numerous supplemental indentures and note forms. The amendment does not modify other parts of the registration statement and becomes effective immediately upon filing.

feed.title: Executive pay and 71% insider stake at Pulse Biosciences (NASDAQ: PLSE)
feed.summary: Pulse Biosciences (PLSE) filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing executive compensation, board composition, and governance, including significant insider ownership. CEO Paul A. LaViolette's 2025 compensation was approximately $7.4 million, largely equity-based with performance and market-driven vesting conditions, while CFO Jon Skinner received about $2.8 million. Director Robert W. Duggan beneficially owns 71.6% of outstanding common stock, with all directors and executive officers collectively holding 74.7%, indicating highly concentrated ownership.

feed.title: Andretti Acquisition Corp. II (NASDAQ:POLE) Sees Significant Drop in Short Interest
feed.summary: Andretti Acquisition Corp. II (NASDAQ:POLE) experienced a significant 19.6% drop in short interest to 776 shares as of April 15th. This leaves a days-to-cover ratio of 0.1 and effective short interest at 0.0% of the stock. Despite several institutional investors initiating or increasing their positions, the stock maintains a consensus "Sell" rating from analysts, including a reaffirmation from Weiss Ratings.

feed.title: Porch Group (PRCH) CEO tax sell-to-cover after PRSU vesting
feed.summary: Porch Group, Inc. CEO Matt Ehrlichman sold 115,642 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, at a weighted average price of $8.1104 per share. This "sell-to-cover" transaction was mandated by the company to satisfy tax withholding obligations for performance-based restricted stock units (PRSUs) that vested on April 7, 2026. Following the sale, Ehrlichman directly holds over 16.6 million shares and indirectly controls more than 6.4 million shares via West Equities, LLC.

feed.title: Porch Group (PRCH) CFO logs required tax-related sale of 10,454 shares
feed.summary: Porch Group, Inc.'s CFO, Shawn Tabak, sold 10,454 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $8.1104 per share. This sale was a mandatory "sell-to-cover" transaction to satisfy tax withholding obligations on vested performance-based restricted stock unit awards. After the sale, Tabak directly holds 364,230 shares, and Porch Group plans to continue settling vested shares through similar transactions until May 21, 2026, to minimize market impact.

feed.title: Pioneer Power CEO lines up investor meetings at New York conference
feed.summary: Pioneer Power Solutions (NASDAQ: PPSI) announced that its Chairman and CEO, Nathan J. Mazurek, will participate in one-on-one investor meetings at the D. Boral Capital Global Conference on May 7, 2026, in New York. The meetings provide an opportunity for investors to engage with company leadership, following recent financial updates and strategic initiatives aimed at expanding its distributed energy resources and EV charging solutions. The announcement emphasizes Pioneer's ongoing investor engagement efforts, with future updates on orders, margins, and new platform execution being key areas to monitor.

feed.title: Principal Real Estate Income Fund Announces Notification of Sources of Distribution

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF(TQQQ) Stock Options Chain | Quotes & News
feed.summary: This document appears to be a placeholder or a very minimal content page for the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ) stock options chain, quotes, and news. It indicates that further information on TQQQ's financial performance, news, and options data is expected.

feed.title: Why Is Teradyne (TER) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
feed.summary: Shares of Teradyne (TER) surged by 13.8% after the company announced record-breaking first-quarter 2026 financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The impressive growth, with total revenue of $1.282 billion and EPS of $2.56, was primarily driven by strong demand in its Semi Test segment and the increasing adoption of AI, which now contributes nearly 70% of its total revenue. Despite its recent jump, the stock is still trading below its 52-week high, showing significant volatility, especially in light of recent industry-wide concerns over AI spending.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare, Inc. to Present at May Conference
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) is scheduled to present at the RBC Global Healthcare Conference on May 20, 2026, at 11:30 AM ET. A live audio webcast and related presentation materials will be available on the Investor Relations section of the company's website. HCA Healthcare is a leading provider of healthcare services, operating 189 hospitals and approximately 2,600 ambulatory sites across 19 states and the United Kingdom.

feed.title: Chair and CEO Linda Rendle on Q3 FY26 performance and outlook
feed.summary: Linda Rendle, Chair and CEO of The Clorox Company, discusses the mixed performance of Q3 FY26. While some areas like cleaning, international, and professional businesses showed strength, challenges were noted in gross margin, litter, and food segments amidst a difficult consumer environment. The company completed its U.S. ERP implementation and the GOJO Industries acquisition, and has updated its fiscal year outlook to reflect these changes and current market conditions.

feed.title: Porch Group (PRCH) COO sale covers PRSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Porch Group's COO, Matthew Neagle, sold 59,901 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $8.1104 per share. This sale was a required "sell-to-cover" transaction to satisfy tax withholding obligations from performance-based restricted stock units (PRSUs) that vested on April 7, 2026. Following the transaction, Neagle directly holds 2,361,998 shares of Porch Group common stock.

feed.title: Plumas Bancorp (PLBC) EVP exercises stock options, now holds 8,100 shares
feed.summary: Aaron M. Boigon, EVP and Chief Information Officer of Plumas Bancorp (PLBC), exercised stock options to acquire 2,500 shares at $21.45 per share. This transaction was a derivative exercise, not an open-market purchase, and increased his direct holdings to 8,100 shares of PLBC common stock. The options were part of a grant vesting in annual installments since October 2020 and are set to expire in October 2027.

feed.title: POSCO HOLDINGS (NYSE: PKX) targets 35–40% shareholder returns for 2026–2028
feed.summary: POSCO HOLDINGS (NYSE: PKX) has announced a new shareholder return policy for 2026–2028, aiming for a 35–40% shareholder return ratio. This will be achieved through a combination of cash dividends and share buybacks with cancellation of treasury shares, funded by adjusted net income. The policy is designed to enhance POSCO's position as a high-dividend company and improve dividend visibility, with final execution depending on business conditions and board approval.

feed.title: 600-Share Form 144 Notice at Peoples Bancorp of NC (NASDAQ: PEBK)

The filing also details multiple recent dispositions by related individuals, including Adrian A. Abernethy and James S. Abernethy, with specific share counts and dollar amounts from early 2026. This notice serves as a disclosure of proposed or past dispositions but does not confirm trade settlements.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] PRECIGEN, INC. Definitive Proxy Statement
feed.summary: Precigen, Inc. (PGEN) is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting on June 18, 2026, where shareholders will vote on key proposals including the election of nine directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as its independent auditor, an advisory vote on 2025 executive compensation, and an amendment to increase the shares available under the 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan by 7 million. The company's 2025 performance highlights include FDA approval and initial launch of Papzimeos, and the proxy statement details corporate governance, director and executive pay, and beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Praxis (NASDAQ: PRAX) details 2026 virtual meeting, director slate and Say-on-Pay
feed.summary: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. is holding its 2026 virtual annual meeting on June 10, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of three Class III directors, the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, and an advisory Say-on-Pay resolution regarding executive compensation. The company reported a 283% one-year return for stockholders in 2025, driven by significant clinical, regulatory, and capital-raising milestones. Praxis has also evolved its executive compensation program for 2026 to include performance-based restricted stock units (PSUs) to further align executive incentives with company performance and long-term value creation.

feed.title: BiomX (NYSE: PHGE) details new board, equity plans and related deals
feed.summary: BiomX Inc. (NYSE: PHGE) filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing its reconstituted board, new executive team, and several significant related-party financial transactions. The amendment provides information on governance, executive compensation, and ownership, including a new 2026 Equity Incentive Plan, a $3.0 million private placement with Pyu Pyu Capital, and the acquisitions of Zorro Net Ltd. and DR. Frucht Systems Ltd. It highlights that the board now includes CEO Michael Oster and CFO David Rokach, along with three independent directors, and notes the material impact of these recent equity-based deals on the company's capital structure.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management reports 5.01% stake in Phinia Inc (PHIN)

The filing indicates that various Vanguard affiliates exercise voting or dispositive power on behalf of certain funds and accounts.

feed.title: LEO satellite deployment rapidly grows edge data stores, Penguin Solutions, Inc. asserts
feed.summary: Penguin Solutions, Inc. highlights that the massive amounts of imaging, sensor, and AI-driven data generated by low earth orbit (LEO) satellites are rapidly expanding edge data stores. Due to limited communication windows, this data must be stored onboard at the edge, creating new technical and logistical challenges for the space industry. The company recently reported strong financial performance and has deployed its Stratus ztC Edge platform for automation purposes.

feed.title: PFSA SEC Filings - Profusa Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
